# The Power Mates

> Dual Microsoft MVPs (Data Platform & AI) helping enterprise teams unlock Microsoft Fabric, Power Platform, and AI. Senior Directors with 20+ years of hands-on experience.

## Who We Are

Gastón Cruz and Alex Rostan are Dual Microsoft MVPs co-hosting The Power Mates — an enterprise data and AI channel with 7,000+ subscribers. They work as Senior Directors in the Microsoft ecosystem and deliver consulting, training, and productized services for data-driven organizations.

## What We Do

- **Tenant Scan**: AI-powered Microsoft 365 and Power Platform governance audit. Surfaces ungoverned flows, DLP gaps, orphaned apps, and compliance risks automatically.
- **Fabric Architecture**: Design and implementation of Microsoft Fabric medallion lakehouses, OneLake architecture, and real-time analytics pipelines.
- **Power Platform Consulting**: Governance frameworks, performance optimization, migration playbooks, and Dataverse architecture for enterprise environments.
- **Semantic Model Audits**: DAX quality review, relationship design, partition strategy, and Power BI performance optimization.
- **Training & Enablement**: Executive briefings, team workshops, and hands-on labs for Microsoft Fabric and Power Platform adoption.

## Key Offerings

- Tenant Scan Starter — entry-level governance audit
- Tenant Scan Professional — deep audit with remediation roadmap
- Tenant Scan Enterprise — comprehensive Microsoft 365 tenant health assessment
- Fabric Architecture Accelerator — medallion lakehouse design sprint
- BI Performance Pack — Power BI report and model optimization
- Migration Playbook — structured Power BI to Fabric migration
- Data Engineering Pack — Fabric pipelines, notebooks, and OneLake
- Pipeline Health Check — reliability and bottleneck analysis
- Semantic Model Audit — DAX and data model review
- Enterprise Transformation — full-scale Fabric and Power Platform modernization

## Content

The Power Mates YouTube channel publishes practical Microsoft Fabric and Power Platform tutorials, demos, and session recordings for enterprise data professionals.
